symptoms.symptom_name: Acute onset within 48h of a major relationship / support-system loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with depressed mood
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A discrete, identifiable psychosocial precipitant with onset within days is the defining feature of an adjustment reaction.
The tight temporal link to a precipitant favours a reactive picture over endogenous depression.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Atypical acute coronary syndrome / stress cardiomyopathy
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Central chest pressure after acute severe stress cannot be excluded as cardiac without ECG/troponin; must drive in-person assessment.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with depressed mood
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Grief-related somatic chest heaviness ('heavy heart') is common, but is a diagnosis of exclusion here.

symptoms.symptom_name: 48h cessation of oral intake with dry mouth and oliguria

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prolonged absence of intake with dry mucosae and reduced urine output is direct evidence of volume depletion.
Postural lightheadedness indicates haemodynamically significant volume depletion (orthostatic hypotension).

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with depressed mood
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hypersomnia and anergia are common depressive/adjustment features; non-specific but consistent.

symptoms.symptom_name: Intermittent palpitations / sense of pounding heart

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Compensatory tachycardia from volume depletion is felt as palpitations.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Atypical acute coronary syndrome / stress cardiomyopathy
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Palpitations keep an arrhythmic/cardiac cause on the differential but are non-specific.

symptoms.symptom_name: Total social isolation / no emergency contact network

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute adjustment disorder with depressed mood
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of a support network is both a precipitant and a factor raising the safety threshold; it magnifies the risk of any physical deterioration.

symptoms.symptom_name: Borderline hypotension with orthostatic drop (BP 95/60, postural change)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective orthostatic hypotension confirms significant volume depletion — a clinician-measured sign; the AI infers it from reported lightheadedness, not a measured BP.

symptoms.symptom_name: Resting tachycardia HR 108 with sluggish capillary refill (3s)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tachycardia with delayed capillary refill indicates compensated hypovolaemia — clinician-measured; not obtainable device-free over chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: 12-lead ECG and troponin to exclude atypical ACS / takotsubo

investigation_details.expected_result: Required to exclude an acute cardiac event; not performed remotely — the in-person assessment provides it.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: An evolving atypical ACS or stress cardiomyopathy could be missed if chest heaviness is attributed to grief without in-person cardiac work-up.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Atypical acute coronary syndrome / stress cardiomyopathy
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: ECG and troponin are the definitive means of excluding an acute cardiac cause of the chest heaviness.

investigation_details.expected_result: Assesses electrolyte derangement and acute kidney injury from dehydration; obtained in person, not over telehealth.
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Undetected AKI or electrolyte disturbance from prolonged fasting/dehydration.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms severity and end-organ effect of volume depletion.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: 48h no intake + orthostatic lightheadedness + palpitations + measured hypotension/tachycardia/sluggish refill together indicate haemodynamically significant volume depletion needing urgent assessment and rehydration.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Atypical acute coronary syndrome / stress cardiomyopathy
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Central chest heaviness plus palpitations after acute stress cannot be excluded as cardiac over telehealth and mandates in-person ECG/troponin.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Exclude an atypical acute coronary syndrome / stress cardiomyopathy as the cause of the chest heaviness — cannot be done remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: U&E / renal function + venous blood gas (in person)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantify dehydration, electrolyte derangement and acute kidney injury from 48h reduced intake.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person orthostatic blood pressure and heart rate measurement
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Objectively confirm the orthostatic hypotension the patient reports as lightheadedness.
Structured risk assessment of a hopeless, self-neglecting, isolated patient; drives crisis disposition.
